sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Array(UInt8));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, values) VALUES (1, emptyArrayUInt8());
UPDATE test_table SET values = emptyArrayUInt8() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, values FROM test_table WHERE values = emptyArrayUInt8();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE values = emptyArrayUInt8();
